bits.premise: A long-term expat returns to America and discovers a series of everyday words that have become forbidden, each with absurd consequences.

lines.text: I recently moved back to the United States after living in South Korea for
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 30 years, so I'm experienced a bit of a culture shock
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The biggest difference is the things you can't say now in America that you could 30 years can't say
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Apparently you can't say homeless you have to say unhoused. I tested this theory out
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I saw homeless guy the other day and I said
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Do you prefer the term homeless or unhoused and I will never forget what he said to me was so poignant
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He said to me, "Stop stealing my thoughts!"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: as he stabbed me repeatedly.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'll put that down as an unhoused
lines.label: tag

lines.text: after I get back from the hospital.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You know, you can't say the word "retard" anymore.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's a new one. You have to say "Democrat."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Um, yeah, you know, a mechanic kicked me out of show.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was shopping the other day just for telling them
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that I blew my -- blew a tranny.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: [ Whistles ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's like, "That's homophobic."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "No, it's -- I drive too hard."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Um, the worst one -- you can't say "f--k" anymore.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: -Go ahead. Go ahead. Finish it. Finish it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: -No, I mean, you have to say, "A bundle of sticks
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with which to start a fire with."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I mean, but that's so long!
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I mean, "f--k" is a good word.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's a good word. I love--
lines.label: tag

lines.text: [BEEP]
lines.label: fluff
